2026-04-20.original_title: OpenAI Takes Aim at Google with New Image Model
2026-04-20.original_content: If you’ve been on X or Reddit in recent weeks, you’ve likely seen images created by an upcoming model from OpenAI floating around. Sharp-eyed people have pointed out that the new model is potentially being tested with some ChatGPT users and on leaderboards under code names. The images generated by that model, which some are calling “gpt-image-2,” are genuinely impressive and, in some cases, nearly indistinguishable from real images. (Bad news for those of us whose parents are already sending us AI-generated images they think are real.) Beyond excelling at producing photorealistic images, the new image generation model could help OpenAI achieve a bigger goal: reaching 1 billion weekly active users of ChatGPT. The company had hoped to hit the milestone by the end of 2025 but it missed that goal and has been stuck in the 900 million WAU zone since then, most recently topping 920 million .
2026-04-20.chinese_title: OpenAI新图像模型浮出水面，直指谷歌图像生成
2026-04-20.summary: OpenAI正在测试一款新的图像生成模型，效果接近真实照片，外界推测它可能已在部分ChatGPT用户中灰度验证。这不仅是图像能力升级，也是在为ChatGPT继续冲击更大用户规模铺路。
2026-04-20.extension: 如果该模型正式上线，OpenAI会继续强化多模态入口优势，迫使Google和Adobe在图像生成与内容创作链路上加速应对。它也会把AI图片的真实性争议推到更前台。

2026-04-20.original_title: Adobe introduces CX Enterprise, an AI agent-based platform that aims to help corporate customers automate digital marketing and other functions (Belle Lin/Wall Street Journal)
2026-04-20.original_content: Belle Lin / Wall Street Journal : Adobe introduces CX Enterprise, an AI agent-based platform that aims to help corporate customers automate digital marketing and other functions — The software maker's new AI agents are aimed at getting ahead of the risk of artificial intelligence to its business
2026-04-20.chinese_title: Adobe推出CX Enterprise，拿AI代理重塑企业营销
2026-04-20.summary: Adobe发布CX Enterprise，试图用AI代理帮助企业自动化数字营销等工作。它的核心意义不只是新产品，而是Adobe在对冲生成式AI对自身软件业务的潜在冲击。
2026-04-20.extension: 如果企业客户接受这种代理式工作流，CRM、营销自动化和创意软件的竞争会从单点功能转向整套流程编排。Adobe、Salesforce等公司都会被迫加快AI化。

2026-04-20.original_title: NSA is using Anthropic's Mythos despite blacklist
2026-04-20.chinese_title: NSA被曝使用Anthropic Mythos，引发黑名单争议
2026-04-20.summary: 有消息称NSA正在使用Anthropic的Mythos模型，这一做法与外界此前对相关禁用或审查预期形成冲突。事件的看点在于政府机构、AI供应商和安全审查之间的边界。
2026-04-20.extension: 这类消息往往会带出更大范围的政府采购、模型合规和安全评估问题，也会影响Anthropic在公共部门市场的扩张节奏。后续值得看是否出现监管或采购层面的回应。

2026-04-20.original_title: Humanoid robots outrun humans at Beijing's second robot half marathon
2026-04-20.original_content: At the second half marathon for humanoid robots in Beijing, Chinese machines posted dramatically faster times on Sunday compared to last year. The article Humanoid robots outrun humans at Beijing's second robot half marathon appeared first on The Decoder .
2026-04-20.chinese_title: 北京机器人半马再升级，人形机器人跑得更快了
2026-04-20.summary: 北京第二届人形机器人半马中，国产机器人整体成绩较去年明显提升，展示出运动控制和工程稳定性的进步。它是一个很直观的机器人产业进展窗口。
2026-04-20.extension: 如果人形机器人在速度、续航和稳定性上持续推进，后续报道会集中到供应链、整机商业化和应用场景落地。中国机器人产业的竞争也会更快从展示转向实战。

2026-04-20.original_title: Sources: Google has created strike team to improve its coding models; Sergey Brin told DeepMind staffers that they must aggressively pivot to catch up on agents (Erin Woo/The Information)
2026-04-20.original_content: Erin Woo / The Information : Sources: Google has created strike team to improve its coding models; Sergey Brin told DeepMind staffers that they must aggressively pivot to catch up on agents — Google has assembled a strike team of researchers and engineers to improve its AI coding models, according to three people …
2026-04-20.chinese_title: 谷歌成立突击小组追赶代码模型，DeepMind被要求加速转向Agent
2026-04-20.summary: 谷歌被曝组建专项团队改进代码模型，Sergey Brin还向DeepMind员工强调必须更激进地转向Agent。消息反映出谷歌在编程模型和代理能力上感受到了现实压力。
2026-04-20.extension: 这类内部调整通常会带来模型路线、组织结构和产品节奏的连锁变化，也会直接影响OpenAI和Anthropic在开发者工具上的竞争格局。未来看点在于谷歌能否把组织压力转化为产品进展。

2026-04-20.original_title: Salesforce bets on "Agent Albert" to prove AI won't kill enterprise software
2026-04-20.original_content: Wall Street worries AI could make traditional enterprise software obsolete. Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff is pushing back with a new AI product and a homegrown metric. The article Salesforce bets on "Agent Albert" to prove AI won't kill enterprise software appeared first on The Decoder .
2026-04-20.chinese_title: Salesforce押注Agent Albert，证明企业软件不会被AI吃掉
2026-04-20.summary: Salesforce推出Agent Albert，试图用AI产品和自有指标回应外界对企业软件被AI替代的担忧。它本质上是在给自己和整个企业软件行业寻找新的生存叙事。
2026-04-20.extension: 如果Salesforce把代理能力做成可量化指标，其他SaaS厂商也会跟进类似叙事，竞争焦点将从功能堆叠转向AI带来的效率证明。企业软件估值逻辑也可能随之变化。

2026-04-20.original_title: Google Creates Strike Team to Improve Coding Models
2026-04-20.original_content: Google has assembled a strike team of researchers and engineers to improve its AI coding models, according to three people with direct knowledge of the situation, as it looks to automate more of its own coding and ultimately its AI research. The push was prompted in part by Anthropic’s recent AI model releases, according to two of the people. Researchers at Google DeepMind view Anthropic’s coding tools as exceeding the code-writing abilities of Google’s Gemini models, the people said.
2026-04-20.chinese_title: 谷歌再组代码模型突击队，正面追赶Anthropic
2026-04-20.summary: 谷歌成立专项团队提升代码模型表现，并希望借此补上与Anthropic在编程能力上的差距。消息说明代码生成已经成为基础模型竞争中最敏感的前线之一。
2026-04-20.extension: 接下来会牵出开发者工具、IDE集成和Agent编程体验的连续竞争，也会影响模型厂商在企业场景里的落地优先级。Anthropic、OpenAI和谷歌的博弈会继续外溢到开发者生态。
